

$Pr(X ~~~~~~ \mathrm{and}~~~~~~~\phi ~~~~~~~~~ \mathrm{and}  ~~~~  \theta)$

$Pr({all ~the ~unknowns}  ~~~~  \mathrm{given} ~~~~~~~{what's ~known} )$

$Pr( ~~~\phi ~~~ \mathrm{and}  ~~  \theta~~~~~~~\mathrm{given} ~~~~~~~~~~~X)$

$\frac{Pr(X ~~~~~~ \mathrm{and}~~~~~~~\phi ~~~~~~~~~ \mathrm{and}  ~~~~  \theta)}{Pr(X)}$



(And beta equations)
$\color{blue}{\beta(1,1) = p^0 \times (1-p)^0 =~1~=~~ 'flat'}$

$\color{red}{\beta(2,2) = p \times (1-p) =~~ 'gentle ~ curve'}$


$\color{green}{= \frac{1}{2}}\times\color{blue}{\large{1}} ~~+ ~~\color{green}{\frac{1}{2}} \times \color{red}{p  (1-p) }$
